Prerequisite: LARC748.

Restriction: Permission of AGNR-Plant Science & Landscape Architecture department.

Repeatable to: 12 credits if content differs.

LATN - Latin

LATN405 Lucretius (3 Credits) Readings are in Latin.

LATN410 Latin Historians (3 Credits) Latin historical writing as a literary genre. Influences, style, and literary techniques. Readings are in Latin.
